creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
It seems that something more specific to your context vs. my context
is involved in leading to the variation in behavior.

Matching the EEPROM content vintage to what I've got might be something
to try. For reference:

RPi: BOOTLOADER release VERSION:e608a69d DATE: 2024/04/15 TIME: 14:12:14
BOOTMODE: 0x06 partition 0 build-ts BUILD_TIMESTAMP=1713186734

I will note that my context is serial console based, not video based.
If I was to continue to use it, I'd also get ssh over ethernet going.
